channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: China's Cyber Espionage Operations Surge Amid Growing Use of Artificial Intelligence
item.description: China-linked cyber operations surge by 150% last year, targeting financial services, media, manufacturing, and industrial sectors, according to CrowdStrike's 2025 Global Threat Report.
item.dc:creator: Major Digest
